sections.text: Embedding drift: after the model update, existing chunks no longer match new queries well. ACL filter performance degrades at 500k+ chunks per tenant — we need to partition by org.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Rolling deployments are causing a 2-3 second error spike because readiness probes lag behind container start. Pod disruption budget is set to 0 for the payments service — we can't drain the node.

sections.text: Hydration mismatch warning on the dashboard — server renders timestamp in UTC, client in local. Next.js 15 App Router migration: the /settings page is still using the Pages Router data fetching.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: MMLU scores for our rerank model, measured on CS subset, dropped after the last checkpoint merge. Retrieval augmentation: we're pulling top-50 chunks but the LLM context window is 128k — room to spare.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: ACL filter performance degrades at 500k+ chunks per tenant — we need to partition by org. The reranker is returning identical scores for candidates with very different content — the model is clipping.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Privacy policy needs updating to reflect the new sub-processor for rerank (SiliconFlow). GDPR data subject access request: must respond within 30 days. Tooling under internal/privacy/.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Coupon redemptions are not being deduplicated — same code can be applied twice in the same checkout. EU VAT calculation is off by the rounding rule — we round per-line, Stripe rounds per-invoice.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: CronJob for nightly ETL is overlapping because concurrencyPolicy was left at the default Allow. Pod disruption budget is set to 0 for the payments service — we can't drain the node.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Prometheus query for p99 latency returns NaN when the service has < 30 requests in the window. Grafana dashboard for the checkout funnel lost its data source binding after the Grafana 10 upgrade.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Capacity plan for Q3: we need 40% more headroom based on the last 90d growth curve. Paging policy: Sev1 pages primary, Sev2 Slack-only during business hours, Sev3 ticket only.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Privacy policy needs updating to reflect the new sub-processor for rerank (SiliconFlow). Vendor risk assessment for new SaaS tools: security, privacy, cost, contract review.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Password reset tokens are not being invalidated after a successful reset — they remain valid for 15 minutes. JWTs issued by the old service had 1h expiry; the new service defaults to 15m and nothing renewed.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Stripe webhook for customer.subscription.trial_will_end is not being dispatched to our handler. Proration is wrong when a customer downgrades mid-cycle; we're crediting too much.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Error budget dashboard shows we've burned 40% of the monthly budget already; it's the 8th. SLO burn-rate alert is too noisy during weekends. Multi-window multi-burn-rate policy needed.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Distributed tracing across our Go → Rust gRPC boundary is not propagating trace context. OpenTelemetry span attribute `http.status_code` is missing from the ingress traces.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Revenue recognition policy updated for annual contracts with milestone deliverables. Audit engagement letter signed with Ernst & Young; fieldwork starts October.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Product roadmap Q2: RAG ingestion, search API, connector marketplace, rerank controls. PRD for the self-service org invites feature: requirements, wireframes, metrics to track.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Permission sync for Confluence is 4 hours behind because the cursor-based pagination hit a rate limit. Ingest pipeline is losing mini-chunks when a section is exactly at the boundary token count.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Session cookie SameSite setting needs to change from Lax to Strict before the Firefox 122 rollout. WebAuthn passkey enrollment fails on Safari 17 when the user has multiple resident credentials registered.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Audit log entries for failed MFA challenges are missing the user_agent field. Users logged in via SSO are redirected to the wrong org after the SAML assertion is consumed.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: A leaked .env file made it to a contributor's fork on GitHub; the key has been revoked and rotated. Incident: an admin token was committed to a public gist. Rotated, scoped all tokens down.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Offer letters include equity vest schedule (4y, 1y cliff) and a 2y post-termination exercise window. Onsite loop: 5 rounds, 45min each. System design, coding, coding, domain, behavioral.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Tailwind's new v4 engine changed how arbitrary values are parsed; our design tokens broke. Next.js 15 App Router migration: the /settings page is still using the Pages Router data fetching.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Debrief happens within 2 hours. Use the rubric, not vibes. Flag any bias in the feedback. Tech screen is 60min: 2 behavioral, 2 technical. Interviewer guide updated 2026-04-01.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Refresh token rotation broke after the move to Keycloak 24 — tokens issued before the upgrade are being rejected. WebAuthn passkey enrollment fails on Safari 17 when the user has multiple resident credentials registered.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: ARR forecast model updated with new customer cohort data; confidence interval tightened. Annual plan for 2026: headcount grows from 45 to 72, OpEx from $8M to $14M.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: SOC 2 auditor flagged that our secret rotation for AWS IAM keys is quarterly, not monthly. A leaked .env file made it to a contributor's fork on GitHub; the key has been revoked and rotated.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Bank account for the UK entity is open; move GBP-denominated customers to it by July. Stock option plan: 4000 shares reserved for Q2 hires, 2500 remaining after current offers.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Usage-based metering events are being counted twice on retry when the initial request times out. The customer portal is letting users cancel subscriptions mid-term without refund logic.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: DR drill scheduled next week: failover postgres from us-east-1 to us-west-2, expected RTO 10m. Load test with k6: 2000 concurrent users hit the search endpoint, p99 was 450ms.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: A/B test results for the new signup flow: +12% activation on the redesigned form. User research: 12 customer interviews about the search experience. Top ask: save and share queries.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Coupon redemptions are not being deduplicated — same code can be applied twice in the same checkout. Failed payment retry cadence needs to match Dunning best practices: day 1, 3, 5, 7, then cancel.

sections.text: Q2 board deck in draft; finance owns slides 1-15, product owns 16-30. SAFE conversion mechanics for the Series A: valuation cap of $50M, 20% discount.
